产品信息.标题: TAGRY Bluetooth Headphones True Wireless Earbuds 60H Playback LED Power Display Earphones

详细评论.评论: These are garbage. This is my second pair and while the sound is decent, they only last about 2-3 months because the charging prongs begin to corrode and they can’t be charged anymore even when cleaned. The most annoying thing however, even when I disconnect them from my phone, they automatically connect over and over again so if you’re listening to music while driving or doing anything with sound on your phone, you have to switch it back to your car audio or phone audio every couple minutes. DO NOT BUY!

I really liked this right dryer I got them. Connected to my phone well. Good sound quality. But after 3-4 months, they started not connecting to my phones Bluetooth despite restarting my phone. And now the one ear bud won’t transmit any sound. Big disappointment.

I deeply regret buying these ear buds.  I bought a pair for myself and they seemed to work just fine for the first few months.  I was pleased enough to buy a second pair for my wife.  Within 2 months both her ear buds and mine began to act up.  They stopped charging and even more frustrating they would automatically connect to our phone while in their closed case.  Which is deeply frustrating because the battery would completely drain overnight and died almost immediately when we arrived at the gym in the morning.  We‘ve now had to now turnoff the bluetooth on our phones everyday, which is super annoying.  I will NEVER buy these again.  Pure trash!

I really love these headphones, how they fit, the sound quality, the just overall quality of the case and the buds themselves. But, they just do not work. It is really upsetting, I am a student and I rely on my headphones for online lectures or needing noise cancelling in the library, they’re amazing when they are working but here’s the problem, they barely work. I got a new pair about a month ago because my old pair had ALSO gone out. They don’t stay charged for more than 10 minutes, they randomly power off, randomly disconnect, and one is always dead. I’ll see it charging in the case then it just stops charging, I try charging the case, the same thing, I tried putting the new buds into the old case, didn’t work. These are amazing headphones but I am so extremely frustrated that I can use them for more than 5-10 minute increments without them shutting off, I could charge them for 3 hours and still only get 5-10 minutes of actual use so disappointing because I really do love these headphones but I can’t keep going on with this.

I’ve only had these for a month and one of the earbuds is finicky about charging. When I put them in the case and close the lid only the right side charges. Sometimes I can force it to charge the left one by charging the case itself with the earbuds inside but I’m sure that will stop working at some point.

More of a hassle to use than wired earbuds. Can only turn off by putting back in charging case, so have to carry case with you. The slightest inadvertent touch force-activated my Spotify, overriding my streaming, making me screw around to try to get back to my show. Have to pay shipping to return, which is about 25% of the purchase price.

详细评论.标题: Good enough for 3 months and then they stop working
详细评论.评论: I’ve had these for 3 months and they already are not working anymore. While sending an audio message it didn’t record half of what I said. And flash forward to today now I cannot connect them to my phone. The case has been at 100% and is not charging the headphones so the case itself has been staying at 100%. The battery has never been amazing on these since I got them and they’re only used at work. I’m extremely frustrated because now I can’t return them or use them. X08 doesn’t even pop up anymore as a bluetooth option and when I plug them in nothing happens.
broken, no noise cancelation and they die after an hour.

详细评论.标题: You get what you pay for
详细评论.评论: Had these when I worked midnights sound quality was fine, tapping into answering a call was fine . Use of them was simple. I could be out of range quite a bit before it went out. Durable headphones and case. The only downside is one side stopped working after a couple of months otherwise would have given 5 stars. Still worth the price though especially being an off brand.

Les First charge on wireless charger I‘ve used for years and they smell like burning motherboard. And making a whining noise. Pulled them off the wireless charger and they a really warm. The noise and smell of burning electronic smell i don‘t trust.

详细评论.标题: Meh, maybe you would, but probably not..
详细评论.评论: They ok... connect real quick, love that... the ability with gloves, rubber er leather, seemingly doesnt matter to pause er play it‘ll pick up the touch... ummm alittle too jumpy with any touch er rub youll likely find your music blaring er next song will play er music will stop all together... so kinda not so cool... battery life is honestly, yes they cheap, ive had better for cheaper... you get maybe 6 hours, if uou dont touch them much... but ultimately what they advertise for usage time and such its about as marketed... Until the sound quality... it is quite subpar, to that of I can personal attest to 5 er 6 cheaper options from 16 dollar ones to 18 dollar pairs... also I have wasted alot of money of some jbls that these are better than... its almost hit er miss sometiems with these things, and as I try to experiment with brands and such to find what works and what doesnt, for me, also to better help people select better for themselves by givin a honest review... was these worth the money?yes, but so are quite a few others in this price range. Would i buy em again?? Not before I would try another brand i know nothin about... should you buy them??? You can, and if you do, youll likely think about how the ones you was comparing with these woulda sounded...
Worked well for a little while. Now the right side will on last about 15 minutes and then it’s dead, but the left will run for hours on end.
Good purchase
Stopped working after 4 months!
Works great initially but MIC STOPPED WORKING and is a known issue

Works well but large delay. I got these for watching videos on my fire tablet but the audio is about 500msec delayed from the video. I confirmed it is these ear buds with another set of Bluetooth buds which have zero delay.
Theses was good while it lasted I bought them back in 2024 an they kinds of lost things over time to the point now the charge doesn’t stay people can’t hear me no more

详细评论.标题: Second time buying both times one ear bud died in under a year.
详细评论.评论: Do not last an entire year. Would not recommend. This was my science time buying, both times one earbud died in under a year.

详细评论.标题: do not buy because these do not stay in
详细评论.评论: absolutely terrible, these just slide right out of your ears no matter how deep you place them in. I guess if you are going to sit completely still while using them they might be fine, but if you plan on working out, walking dogs, or moving around in any way, these will just slide out and fall onto the ground. sound quality is fine but it doesn‘t really matter when they don‘t stay in.

详细评论.标题: Control of my volume on my terms, not the decives!
详细评论.评论: The sound quality is nice, but the thing I hate about them is that it will hijack the volume control to either too high or I can no longer hear at all. That is completely frustrating when I am working out. I would return them, but it is too late.It is not noise cancellation it is you can no longer hear music when it says,“ volume minimized,“ meaning all the way down. It‘s like AI program bad algorithm hijack, and I hate it.I would like to control my own volume on my own phone not the headphones.

Not the best & hurts ears
Terrible product. The touch sensor is so sensitive, I can’t do anything without my music pausing. If they’d fix this issue it would be great. But this a huge inconvenience and an annoyance.
